power_governance.name: Ministry, Leadership & Governance
power_governance.description: Leadership and policy direction of the Ministry of Power. Includes the Minister of Power's activities, NERC (Nigerian Electricity Regulatory Commission) regulations, and electricity acts.

electricity_gen_trans_dist.name: Electricity Generation, Transmission & Distribution
electricity_gen_trans_dist.description: The entire power value chain. Covers GenCos (Generation Companies), TCN (Transmission Company of Nigeria), DisCos (Distribution Companies), national grid stability, and power plants (Egbin, Kainji, Shiroro).

power_fuel_gas_supply.name: Fuel & Gas Supply for Power
power_fuel_gas_supply.description: Gas supply to power plants. Covers gas shortages, pipeline vandalism affecting power, and agreements with gas suppliers.

energy_pricing_tariffs.name: Energy Pricing, Tariffs & Subsidy
energy_pricing_tariffs.description: Cost of electricity. Covers Band A, Band B tariffs, electricity subsidy removal, estimated billing, and prepaid meters.

renewable_energy_transition.name: Renewable Energy & Energy Transition
renewable_energy_transition.description: Clean energy initiatives. Covers solar power, mini-grids, REA (Rural Electrification Agency), hydroelectricity, and Nigeria's energy transition plan.

power_public_sentiment.name: Public Sentiment & Citizen Complaints
power_public_sentiment.description: Public reaction to power supply. Covers blackouts, load shedding, 'up nepa', 'no light', and complaints about DisCos.

power_projects_infrastructure.name: Projects, Infrastructure & Reforms
power_projects_infrastructure.description: Major power projects and reforms. Includes the Siemens Presidential Power Initiative (PPI), construction of new substations, and transmission lines.

power_infrastructure_security.name: Critical Infrastructure Security
power_infrastructure_security.description: Protection of power assets. Covers vandalism of transmission towers, theft of transformers, and sabotage.

power_media_narrative.name: Media, Opposition & Political Narrative
power_media_narrative.description: Political discourse around power. Includes opposition criticism of power failure and media editorials on the energy crisis.

power_regional_issues.name: State & Regional Energy Issues
power_regional_issues.description: State government involvement in power (following the new Electricity Act allowing states to generate power).

power_investments_partnerships.name: Investments & International Partnerships
power_investments_partnerships.description: Funding and loans for power. Includes World Bank loans, AfDB support, and private sector investment.

power_operational_metrics.name: Operational Metrics & Performance
power_operational_metrics.description: Technical performance data. Covers peak generation (MW), system collapse frequency, and metering gap.
